bio: Operational tooling team at Anthropic. Ships agentic developer tools and protocol reference implementations.
VP of Product at Vercel. React, Next.js, and developer experience.
Designer and engineer. Building open-source UI primitives and Next.js starters.
Creator of Hono. Works on ultrafast web frameworks for the edge runtime.
Lead maintainer at Drizzle Team. TypeScript ORMs, migrations, and developer tooling.
Co-founder of LangChain. Builds frameworks for LLM-powered applications.
Founder of Astral. Building fast Python tooling in Rust.
Open-source developer working on efficient LLM inference in C/C++.
Creator of Pydantic. Founder of Pydantic Services. Python data validation and observability.
Co-founder of Ollama. Making local LLMs easy to run anywhere.
Co-founder of Tauri. Building secure, cross-platform desktop apps with Rust.
Creator of the Zig programming language. Focus on low-level systems software.
